revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿六]][[zh:二月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 26|qq=February 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199879}} 16 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|744|en|744|qid=Q23608|lt=744|1=744}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|qid=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} moves the capital from {{ill|Kuni-kyō|ja|恭仁宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuni-kyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 恭仁京|1=Kuni-kyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1155335}} to {{ill|Naniwa-kyō|en|Naniwa-kyō|qid=Q1042338|lt=Naniwa-kyō|1=Naniwa-kyō}} , but relocates it back to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heijō-kyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} the following year. * {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|qid=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin (era)|1=Kōnin (era)}} 14 (Julian {{ill|823|en|823|qid=Q29944|lt=823|1=823}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}} ) – By imperial decree of {{ill|Emperor Saga|ja|Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Mount Hiei|ja|Mount Hiei寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Hiei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is renamed {{ill|Enryaku-ji|en|Enryaku-ji|qid=Q917195|lt=Enryaku-ji|1=Enryaku-ji}} . * {{ill|Kangen (era)|ja|Kangen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangen (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1243|en|1243|qid=Q5438|lt=1243|1=1243}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}} ) – Era name changed from {{ill|Ninji|en|Ninji|qid=Q1194262|lt=Ninji (era)|1=Ninji}} to Kangen. * {{ill|Bunpō|en|Bunpō|qid=Q987788|lt=Bunpō (era)|1=Bunpō}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1318|en|1318|qid=Q5755|lt=1318|1=1318}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Hanazono|en|Emperor Hanazono|qid=Q440503|lt=Emperor Hanazono|1=Emperor Hanazono}} abdicates, and {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} ascends the throne. * {{ill|Shōhei|en|Shōhei|qid=Q1143587|lt=Shōhei (era)|1=Shōhei}} 6 / {{ill|Kannō (era)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannō (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1351|en|1351|qid=Q6104|lt=1351|1=1351}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Nōken|ja|上杉能憲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Nōken|1=Uesugi Nōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11359237}} assassinates {{ill|Kō no Moronao|en|Kō no Moronao|qid=Q1036957|lt=Kō Moronao|1=Kō no Moronao}} and {{ill|Kō no Moroyasu|en|Kō no Moroyasu|qid=Q11669872|lt=Kō Moroyasu|1=Kō no Moroyasu}} in {{ill|Settsu (disambiguation)|en|Settsu (disambiguation)|qid=Q343694|lt=Settsu Province|1=Settsu (disambiguation)}} . * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1609|en|1609|qid=Q6762|lt=1609|1=1609}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|qid=Q2461|lt=March 31|1=March 31}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Tadatsune|en|Shimazu Tadatsune|qid=Q1185372|lt=Shimamura Tadatsune|1=Shimazu Tadatsune}} , lord of {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} , invades the {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|qid=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}} and captures {{ill|Shuri Castle|en|Shuri Castle|qid=Q907052|lt=Shuri Castle|1=Shuri Castle}} . * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|qid=Q2504|lt=April 9|1=April 9}} ) – The {{ill|Hietsu Earthquake|ja|飛越Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hietsu Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} strikes the {{ill|Hokuriku region|en|Hokuriku region|qid=Q381025|lt=Hokuriku region|1=Hokuriku region}} , causing severe damage. == Births == * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1220|en|1220|qid=Q5392|lt=1220|1=1220}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|qid=Q2510|lt=April 1|1=April 1}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Saga|ja|後Emperor Saga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Saga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 88th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (+ {{ill|1272|en|1272|qid=Q5524|lt=1272|1=1272}} ). * {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|qid=Q1145295|lt=Manji (era)|1=Manji (era)}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1658|en|1658|qid=Q6991|lt=1658|1=1658}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}} ) – {{ill|Muro Kyūsō|en|Muro Kyūsō|qid=Q6565179|lt=Muro Kyūsō|1=Muro Kyūsō}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1734|en|1734|qid=Q6977|lt=1734|1=1734}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1709|en|1709|qid=Q6857|lt=1709|1=1709}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}} ) – {{ill|Tanikawa Kotosuga|en|Tanikawa Kotosuga|qid=Q6536708|lt=Tanikawa Kotosuga|1=Tanikawa Kotosuga}} , {{ill|kokugaku|ja|Kokugakuist|1=Kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kokugaku|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q855159}} scholar (+ {{ill|1776|en|1776|qid=Q7703|lt=1776|1=1776}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Shōhei|en|Shōhei|qid=Q1143587|lt=Shōhei (era)|1=Shōhei}} 6 / {{ill|Kannō (era)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannō (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1351|en|1351|qid=Q6104|lt=1351|1=1351}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}} ) – {{ill|Kō no Moronao|en|Kō no Moronao|qid=Q1036957|lt=Kō Moronao|1=Kō no Moronao}} , {{ill|Kō no Moroyasu|en|Kō no Moroyasu|qid=Q11669872|lt=Kō Moroyasu|1=Kō no Moroyasu}} , {{ill|Kō Moroyuki|ja|高師世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō Moroyuki|1=Kō No Moroyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11669866}} , and {{ill|Kō Moronatsu|ja|高師夏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō Moronatsu|1=Sou no Moronatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15838920}} , samurai generals. * {{ill|Shōhei|en|Shōhei|qid=Q1143587|lt=Shōhei (era)|1=Shōhei}} 7 / {{ill|Kannō (era)|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannō (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1352|en|1352|qid=Q6112|lt=1352|1=1352}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|en|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|qid=Q725375|lt=Ashikaga Tadayoshi|1=Ashikaga Tadayoshi}} , samurai general and younger brother of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q297107}} (* {{ill|1306|en|1306|qid=Q5716|lt=1306|1=1306}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka (era)|1=Kōka}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1844|en|1844|qid=Q7633|lt=1844|1=1844}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|qid=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}} ) – {{ill|Mamiya Rinzō|en|Mamiya Rinzō|qid=Q952891|lt=Mamiya Rinzō|1=Mamiya Rinzō}} , explorer (* {{ill|1775|en|1775|qid=Q7700|lt=1775|1=1775}} ). == Commemorations == == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|25|2|27|1|26|3|2|0226|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
